sections.paragraph:
Original: צנּה

Transliteration: tsinnâh

Phonetic: tsin-naw'

BDB Definition:

  1. something piercing, hook, barb
    1. meaning dubious
  2. coolness, cold (of snow)
  3. shield, large shield, buckler
    1. shield

Origin: from H6791

TWOT entry: 1936b,1937a,1938a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
